title: ICAO RVSM monitoring requirements — Asia-Pacific update
rawText:

ICAO RVSM Monitoring Update

The ICAO Asia-Pacific RVSM monitoring group has published revised height-keeping performance thresholds effective Q3 2026. Operators must review training scenarios and briefing packs.
